title: Warm Smoky Greek Tomato Avgolemono
description: Buttery, flaky, festive Greek dish featuring San Marzano tomatoes and a smoky flavor, all in a dairy-free friendly avgolemono form.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and saut5 for 5 minutes, until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the fire-roasted San Marzano tomatoes, smoked paprika, and dairy-free veggie broth to the skillet.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the lemon juice and 1/4 cup of warm water.
Temper the lemon mixture by slowly pouring it into the warm broth, whisking constantly.
Stir in the cooked rice and cook for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Serve the avgolemono hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
